name: AI Agency Revenue Recovery & Win-Back Automation Tool
category: Agency Operations / Client Retention / Revenue Recovery
framework: R.E.C.O.V.E.R. — Research, Evaluate, Craft, Orchestrate, Verify, Execute, Retain
description: Zero-dependency Python CLI tool for analyzing lost clients, scoring recovery potential, generating personalized win-back campaigns, and projecting revenue recovery. Covers 15 loss reasons, 15 industries, 15 service lines, with 3 win-back sequences per client duration tier.
features: 4-tier prioritization system (Hot Lead / Warm Prospect / Lukewarm / Cold)
15 loss reason categories with 3 recovery strategies each (45 total strategies)
3 win-back sequences based on time since loss (1-30d, 30-90d, 90d+)
Revenue recovery projection with realism factors
